title: Capability Buildprint Author
creator: Agent Buildprint
summary: An authoring Buildprint that turns a capability idea, existing integration, vendor docs, or source repo into a valid phased Capability Buildprint packet.
promise: Guides agents through intake, capability boundary, contract authoring, phased workflow authoring, and publication checks for reusable Capability Buildprints.
risks: Authored packets still need dogfooding against real host repos
Vendor-specific implementation quality depends on source evidence and docs
Proof claims must remain conservative until a capability is applied
checks: Capability is bounded to one reusable promise
Verification and receipt rules are concrete

publicStatus.label: Draft authoring workflow
publicStatus.explanation: Ready to create the first real capability packet, likely Stripe subscriptions or RBAC.
